title: PerformanceSet Schema + Chef Notifications
description: Unifies ChefSet + AlchemySet + Recipe into a single schema-driven PerformanceSet type. Chef output is constrained to the PerformanceSet JSON schema. Chef completion triggers an in-app notification with View Details / Show / Activate actions.

stories.title: PerformanceSet Ecto schema + migration
stories.description: Create SoundForge.DJ.PerformanceSet with fields: id (uuid), user_id, track_id, name, set_type (:cueset|:loopset|:stemset|:hybrid), source (:chef|:manual|:imported), schema_version, items (jsonb array of PerformanceSetItem), metadata (jsonb), activated_at, generation_opts (jsonb). Items have: position_ms, end_ms, label, item_type, color, sort_order, loop_start_ms, loop_end_ms, stem_config, confidence.
acceptance_criteria: JSON schema exported via PerformanceSet.json_schema/0 for Chef constraint
Items stored as embedded JSONB array (no separate table needed)

stories.title: Chef constrained to PerformanceSet schema
stories.description: Update ChefWorker and Chef.ex to produce output conforming to PerformanceSet structure. The LLM system prompt includes the JSON schema as a constraint. finalized_recipe is validated against the schema before broadcast. On success, persist as PerformanceSet record.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid outputs are rejected with :schema_violation error
On success, PerformanceSets.create/1 is called before broadcast
broadcast_complete passes persisted PerformanceSet id in payload

stories.title: In-app notification on Chef completion
stories.description: When chef_complete fires, call Notifications.push/2 with type: :chef_complete, title: 'Set Ready', message: set name, metadata: %{performance_set_id: id, track_id: ...}. DashboardLive subscribes to notifications:{user_id} and shows a toast with three action buttons: View Details, Show, Activate.
acceptance_criteria: Chef completion triggers Notifications.push with chef_complete type
Toast notification appears with set name
Three action buttons: View Details, Show, Activate
Show scrolls/navigates to the set in the DJ tab
Activate immediately loads the set into the DJ deck

stories.title: Notification bell UI with unread count badge
stories.description: Add notification bell icon to AppHeader with unread count badge. Dropdown shows recent notifications. Mark as read on open. Chef notifications show set name + action buttons inline.
acceptance_criteria: Bell icon in header shows red badge with count when unread > 0
Click opens dropdown with notification list
Chef notifications have View Details / Activate buttons
